docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00 FILED BY DEFENDANT NUDEL, LARISA AS TO PLAINTIFF POON, RANDY
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY POON, RANDY NUDEL, LARISA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT NUDEL, LARISA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT POON, RANDY THE COURT DID NOT FIND EVIDENCE OF BAD FAITH THAT THE LAWSUIT WAS FRAUDULENT OR PREDATORY AND THUS CANNOT AWARD DAMAGES FOR ANY EMOTIONAL HARM RESULTING FROM THIS SUIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR, TRAN # W6325514D001, TAG # 037994 BY DEFENDANT NUDEL, LARISA
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT NUDEL, LARISA
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS FILED BY PLAINTIFF POON, RANDY AS TO DEFENDANT NUDEL, LARISA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,490.55 FILED BY POON, RANDY AS TO DEFENDANT NUDEL, LARISA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $20.00 SERVED MAR-28-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NUDEL, LARISA
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY NUDEL, LARISA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT POON, RANDY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-01-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-01-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAWN PAYNE. APPEARANCES: CROSS-COMPLAINANT LARISA NUDEL IS PRESENT. CROSS-DEFENDANT RANDY POON IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POON, RANDY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NUDEL, LARISA $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,095.00, FOR THE DEDUCTIBLE. DEFENDANT PROVED THE REMAINING AMOUNT WAS PAID UNKNOWN BY THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REMARK:EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2025 ORDERED DESTROYED
